steps.title: Identify the shared feature task
steps.content: The question asks for the choice that emphasizes how Thin in the Old and Victor are similar. The notes give several facts about dates, auction years, media, and size, but the relevant shared feature is that both works use acrylic.

steps.title: Eliminate contrast and dates
steps.content: Choice B states that Basquiat completed Thin in the Old in 1986 and Victor in 1987. That only places the works in sequence; it does not emphasize a similarity. Choice C lists each work's materials and uses while, so it foregrounds the different compositions instead of the shared acrylic medium.

steps.title: Choose the similarity sentence
steps.content: Choice D says Victor is larger than Thin in the Old, which emphasizes a difference in size. Choice A says that both works use acrylic paint as a medium, directly naming something the two works have in common while using relevant information from the notes. The answer is A.
